title: ANC - Transparency mode behavior during the call
scenario: Transparency Mode in Device Settings > ANC tab is not greyed out and allows selection during an active call
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Connect to a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2).
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Navigate to Audio Settings → ANC tab.
5. Place an active call (either incoming or outgoing) using the connected Poly device.
6. While on the call, observe the Transparency Mode option within the ANC tab.
7. Attempt to tap/select the Transparency Mode option.
expected: The Transparency Mode option should be greyed out and non-selectable. When tapped, a pop-up dialog should appear with the message "This settings cannot be adjusted while on a call" and an "Ok" button. Tapping "Ok" should close the dialog.
